title: An Ordinance Regulating the Use and Operation of Videoke, Karaoke, Radio, Loudspeakers and Other Audio or Sound Devices That Cause Disturbance Noise in Residences, Commercial Establishments and Public Places and Streets During Class Hours and Providing Penalties for Violation Thereof and for Other Purposes. (AUTHOR:COUNCILWOMAN ARLENE P. DELOS SANTOS, 11/03/2020)
